mydata_clearance.intended_business_use: 店铺级经营日期窗口发现，给后续 overview 指标查询提供真实可用日期范围
mydata_clearance.observed_error_message: App does not have permission to access this api
mydata_clearance.why_this_method_matters: 没有 date range，就无法对店铺级 visitor/imps/click/fb/reply 口径做稳定调用与复验。
mydata_clearance.minimal_permission_scope_ask_wording: Please grant the current WIKA app tenant access to alibaba.mydata.overview.date.get for the current ICBU seller account so we can discover valid overview date windows in production.
mydata_clearance.evidence_of_access_granted: 真实返回 start_date / end_date 范围，且不再出现 InsufficientPermission。

mydata_clearance.intended_business_use: 店铺级行业/主营维度发现，给 overview 指标查询提供真实 industry context
mydata_clearance.observed_error_message: App does not have permission to access this api
mydata_clearance.why_this_method_matters: 没有 industry 维度，就无法稳定构造店铺级 overview 指标查询的真实业务参数。
mydata_clearance.minimal_permission_scope_ask_wording: Please grant the current WIKA app tenant access to alibaba.mydata.overview.industry.get for the current ICBU seller account so we can discover valid industry context in production.
mydata_clearance.evidence_of_access_granted: 真实返回 industry_id / industry_desc / main_category，且不再出现 InsufficientPermission。

mydata_clearance.intended_business_use: 店铺级经营基础指标读取
mydata_clearance.observed_error_message: App does not have permission to access this api
mydata_clearance.why_this_method_matters: 这是当前最直接的店铺级 UV / 曝光 / 点击 / 询盘 / 回复相关公开候选入口；若无权限，任务 1/2 无法获得店铺级经营指标。
mydata_clearance.minimal_permission_scope_ask_wording: Please grant the current WIKA app tenant access to alibaba.mydata.overview.indicator.basic.get for the current ICBU seller account so we can read store-level visitor / imps / click / feedback / reply metrics in production.
mydata_clearance.evidence_of_access_granted: 真实返回 visitor / imps / clk / clk_rate / fb / reply 任一字段，且不再出现 InsufficientPermission。

mydata_clearance.intended_business_use: 产品级表现日期窗口发现，给 self.product 指标查询提供真实统计周期
mydata_clearance.observed_error_message: App does not have permission to access this api
mydata_clearance.why_this_method_matters: 没有产品级 date range，就无法稳定调用曝光、点击、访客、询盘等产品表现指标。
mydata_clearance.minimal_permission_scope_ask_wording: Please grant the current WIKA app tenant access to alibaba.mydata.self.product.date.get for the current ICBU seller account so we can discover valid product-performance date windows in production.
mydata_clearance.evidence_of_access_granted: 真实返回 start_date / end_date 范围，且不再出现 InsufficientPermission。

mydata_clearance.observed_error_message: App does not have permission to access this api
mydata_clearance.why_this_method_matters: 这是当前最直接的产品级曝光、点击、访客、询盘、关键词效果公开候选入口；若无权限，任务 1/2 无法获得产品表现层。
mydata_clearance.minimal_permission_scope_ask_wording: Please grant the current WIKA app tenant access to alibaba.mydata.self.product.get for the current ICBU seller account so we can read product-level performance metrics in production.
mydata_clearance.evidence_of_access_granted: 真实返回 click / impression / visitor / fb / order / bookmark / compare / share / keyword_effects 任一字段，且不再出现 InsufficientPermission。
